title: Shulker Preview
description: Data+resource pack for viewing inside of shulker boxes in your inventory
body:
## Shulker Preview

This is a data and resource pack that lets you view the contents of shulker boxes and ender chests inside your inventory. It uses custom fonts to add item and tooltip textures, and displays them in the item's lore.

It's just like [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) or similar mods, but as a vanilla data pack.

Both the data pack and resource pack must be used for the preview to work properly. If the server or world is missing the data pack, the resource pack will have no effects. If any player is missing the resource pack, that player will see the normal vanilla tooltip.
